MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-25-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANTS STANLEY PRODUCE AND GILDARDO RIVERA MORENO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. ERIC RATINOFF, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURT CALL. KEVIN HERMANSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURT CALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/20/20 IS CONTINUED TO 4/12/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
